name: Kanban

parameters.name: OnCardDrop
parameters.description: Raised when a card is dropped onto a column (mouse/touch drag) and the board can resolve which card moved, from which column, to which column and at what index. Fires only when cards carry a CardId and columns a ColumnId; otherwise the per-column OnDrop still fires with the raw event for fully-manual boards.

parameters.name: OnCardMove
parameters.description: Raised when a card is moved via the keyboard (arrow keys on a focused card): Left/Right move it to the previous/next column, Up/Down reorder it within its column. Provides the keyboard-accessible alternative to drag-and-drop. Requires CardId on cards and ColumnId on columns so the board can resolve the move.

events.name: OnCardDrop
events.description: Raised when a card is dropped onto a column (mouse/touch drag) and the board can resolve which card moved, from which column, to which column and at what index. Fires only when cards carry a CardId and columns a ColumnId; otherwise the per-column OnDrop still fires with the raw event for fully-manual boards.

events.name: OnCardMove
events.description: Raised when a card is moved via the keyboard (arrow keys on a focused card): Left/Right move it to the previous/next column, Up/Down reorder it within its column. Provides the keyboard-accessible alternative to drag-and-drop. Requires CardId on cards and ColumnId on columns so the board can resolve the move.

enums.name: MoveDirection
enums.description: The direction of a keyboard-initiated card move.

records.name: DropEventArgs
records.signature: DropEventArgs(string CardId, string? FromColumnId, string ToColumnId, int ToIndex)
records.description: Payload describing a drag-drop of a card between/within columns.

records.name: MoveEventArgs
records.signature: MoveEventArgs(string CardId, string FromColumnId, MoveDirection Direction)
records.description: Payload describing a keyboard-initiated card move.

records.name: BoardContext
records.description: A single stable instance cascaded per board. Tracks the in-flight drag so a column's drop handler can read which card is being dragged and from where — the HTML5 DataTransfer is unreliable (and empty under the touch shim), so the board carries the drag identity itself.

examples.title: Drag & Drop Board
examples.code:
<Kanban>
    <KanbanColumn Title="To Do" Badge="3">
        <KanbanCard Title="Design landing page"
                    Labels="@(new List<KanbanCard.KanbanLabel> { new() { Text = "Design", Color = "primary" } })" />
        <KanbanCard Title="Write API docs"
                    Labels="@(new List<KanbanCard.KanbanLabel> { new() { Text = "Docs", Color = "secondary" } })" />
    </KanbanColumn>
    <KanbanColumn Title="In Progress" Badge="1">
        <KanbanCard Title="Build auth flow"
                    Description="Login and register flow."
                    Labels="@(new List<KanbanCard.KanbanLabel> { new() { Text = "High", Color = "destructive" } })" />
    </KanbanColumn>
    <KanbanColumn Title="Done" Badge="1">
        <KanbanCard Title="Project setup" Labels="@(new List<KanbanCard.KanbanLabel> { new() { Text = "Done", Color = "success" } })" />
    </KanbanColumn>
</Kanban>

examples.title: Custom Header
examples.code:
<KanbanColumn>
    <HeaderContent>
        <Flex Class="items-center gap-2">
            <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm font-medium">Sprint 4</Lumeo.Text>
            <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Secondary">5</Badge>
        </Flex>
    </HeaderContent>
    <KanbanCard Title="Task A" />
</KanbanColumn>

parameters.name: CardId
parameters.description: Stable id for this card, written into the board's drop/move payloads.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: This card's position within its column. Optional: when left unset the column derives the insert index from the card's sibling order at drop time, so the documented usage (which omits Index) still produces a precise insert index instead of always targeting position 0.

parameters.name: OnDrop
parameters.description: Raw drop event. Still fired for fully-manual boards that track drag state themselves. For an enriched payload (which card, from/to column, index) give the column a ColumnId, give cards a CardId, and handle Kanban.OnCardDrop at the board level.

parameters.name: ColumnId
parameters.description: Stable id for this column, written into the board's drop/move payloads.

events.name: OnDrop
events.description: Raw drop event. Still fired for fully-manual boards that track drag state themselves. For an enriched payload (which card, from/to column, index) give the column a ColumnId, give cards a CardId, and handle Kanban.OnCardDrop at the board level.

records.name: ColumnContext
records.description: Cascaded to child cards so a card can advertise the insert index when it is the drag-over target.

mdSummary:
# Kanban

Drag-and-drop board with swimlanes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Drag & Drop
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/kanban

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Kanban | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Kanban | OnCardDrop | `EventCallback<DropEventArgs>` | `` | Raised when a card is dropped onto a column (mouse/touch drag) and the board can resolve which card moved, from which column, to which column and at what index. Fires only when cards carry a CardId and columns a ColumnId; otherwise the per-column OnDrop still fires with the raw event for fully-manual boards. |
| Kanban | OnCardMove | `EventCallback<MoveEventArgs>` | `` | Raised when a card is moved via the keyboard (arrow keys on a focused card): Left/Right move it to the previous/next column, Up/Down reorder it within its column. Provides the keyboard-accessible alternative to drag-and-drop. Requires CardId on cards and ColumnId on columns so the board can resolve the move. |
| Kanban | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Kanban | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Board | `Kanban.BoardContext?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Column | `KanbanColumn.ColumnContext?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Labels | `List<KanbanLabel>?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Avatar | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Draggable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| KanbanCard | CardId | `string?` | `` | Stable id for this card, written into the board's drop/move payloads. |
| KanbanCard | Index | `int` | `-1` | This card's position within its column. Optional: when left unset the column derives the insert index from the card's sibling order at drop time, so the documented usage (which omits Index) still produces a precise insert index instead of always targeting position 0. |
| KanbanCard | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | Board | `Kanban.BoardContext?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | Badge | `int?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | HeaderContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | AllowAdd | `bool` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | OnAdd | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | OnDrop | `EventCallback<DragEventArgs>` | `` | Raw drop event. Still fired for fully-manual boards that track drag state themselves. For an enriched payload (which card, from/to column, index) give the column a ColumnId, give cards a CardId, and handle Kanban.OnCardDrop at the board level. |
| KanbanColumn | ColumnId | `string?` | `` | Stable id for this column, written into the board's drop/move payloads. |
| KanbanColumn | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Kanban) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (KanbanCard) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (KanbanColumn) — RenderFragment slot
- `HeaderContent` (KanbanColumn) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnCardDrop` (`EventCallback<DropEventArgs>`) — Raised when a card is dropped onto a column (mouse/touch drag) and the board can resolve which card moved, from which column, to which column and at what index. Fires only when cards carry a CardId and columns a ColumnId; otherwise the per-column OnDrop still fires with the raw event for fully-manual boards.
- `OnCardMove` (`EventCallback<MoveEventArgs>`) — Raised when a card is moved via the keyboard (arrow keys on a focused card): Left/Right move it to the previous/next column, Up/Down reorder it within its column. Provides the keyboard-accessible alternative to drag-and-drop. Requires CardId on cards and ColumnId on columns so the board can resolve the move.

## Sub-components
- `KanbanCard`, `KanbanColumn`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Board` (`Kanban.BoardContext?`)
- `Column` (`KanbanColumn.ColumnContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Kanban />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Kanban/Kanban.razor`
- `UI/Kanban/KanbanCard.razor`
- `UI/Kanban/KanbanColumn.razor`
